description: Manifest of real datasets used by HeatGuard. Archive and forecast rows are fetched from Open-Meteo and cached under data/cache/.

weather.source: Open-Meteo Archive API (ERA5-class reanalysis) and Forecast API

demo.note: Primary demo — May shoulder season before UAE ban (15 Jun)
Primary demo — in-season humid-morning gap vs noon ban

gulf_season.note: Qatar — only GCC state with a WBGT cutoff in law

forecast.note: Near-live hourly forecast for shift planning; cached for offline demo

policy.source_note: Summaries of published GCC occupational heat regulations and ILO guidance for policy-gap analysis (Stage 3 RAG corpus).

epidemiology.source_note: Published aggregate statistics — not individual worker records.

intervention.source_note: La Isla / Adelante WRS effect sizes (2024 ILO report).

economics.source_note: Illustrative ROI assumptions — tunable, not empirical.
